Cassian

- - -

Has top surgery scars that actually look like cult ritual scars. could definitely be arrested for them.

Pirate Sending Stone built into rapier
Rapier that crits on 19s, +2, extra d8 psychic damage

Personality

Backstory

Got his top surgery at divergent isles claires, they did it for free and tried to sacrifice his soul to a powerful devil or demon but it didn't work.

Leg Opener has a band and Alimony frequented the same bar. alimony came in covered in blood at like age 14 and leg opener said "hey kid instead of punching that wall do you want to come over here and learn the lyre and join my emo band". Alimony then kinned him and took a hard left into emo instead of joining the band. The person who did Alimony's top surgery tried to sacrifice his soul to his dead god parent.
Claire's was a cover for the dead god and they were trying to bring the dead god back. they tried to sacrifice him but his dead godly parent was like "ew gross"

There was an orgy and the nihilistic energy of the orgy was enough to pique the interest of the god of nihilism who influenced life so Alimony's mother would get pregnant. some time later, alimony was born in a place with drow but one that also doesn't like aasimar. possibly the puritan town. a few years after he was born as he was an infant showing clear aasimar signs, a powerful witch came to make a deal with his parents that she would take him away so they didn't have to burn him alive. Alimony has 4 siblings, one was a tiefling that was burnt. the others live beautiful lives with their loving parents.
they accepted the deal and she took him back to her tower where she raised him. and whenever he would annoy her in any way she would pluck one of his feathers and use them to augment her power. One time when she was having a bad day and alimony tripped and spilled water on her shoes while she was yelling at him, which in turn caused him to trip, as recompense she then plucked all the feathers on his body and used them to stuff a fine pillow. he has many scars from this incident due to how roughly the feathers were plucked while he was shaking and crying. he was 9.
Eventually an order of paladins arrived and slew the witch for her crimes liberating alimony. Alimony was sad but also relieved as the paladins were nice to him. he didn't really understand the concept of what had just occurred. he was nearly 12 and they kept him around and threw a birthday party for him sometimes later. until they went to find and slay a cult, but the cult slew them first.
he waited at the tavern he was told to wait at for several days as the tavern keep let him stay overnight. eventually the tavern keep offered him a job, still at this point being 12 years old.
He was in charge of managing ledgers of some of the bars inventory and instructed only to open letters with specific seals on them. one day he opened the wrong letter and found one detailing future plans of the same cult that killed the paladins. the bartender then came up behind him and alimony was confused "I think I opened the wrong letter..." as the barkeeper knocked him out.
he woke up on the side of a cliff and saw the body of one of his friends dead below. the bodies were rotted but he recognised the paladins emblems and swords. He was then pushed off the cliff and his vision went black.
he awoke elsewhere assuming the fall mustn't have been as bad as he thought and the strangers he met must have caught him.
The group grilled him on the body pile and he told them all about it as they were all surprised how stable he seemed. they then asked if he had anywhere to go or if he had any work experience to which he replied that he did. so they picked him over 19 year old lyre.
he worked there for several years and ,

captain Yuri divorcee

doctor
doctor and chef had an affair
the doctor left his wife because he realised he was gay and because she was embezzling and stealing from him. this is because the wife was working with the chef to embezzle into his cooking industry. while this was going on the chef had a chain restaurant. while all the legal disputes were going on the doctor and the chef fell in love. then the wife realised she was a lesbian and had an affair. so they parted on good terms because the wife was escaping to another country and the doctor and chef were escaping on the ship. and the son got roped in while just trying to finish his degree in politics and while also dating a politicians daughter.

chef

navigator
is the estranged son of the chef
the navigator and alimony have a rivalry going on and the navigator would call him the racist slur, "feathers". the navigator said "I've always wanted a hot minotaur girlfriend " too many times so they broke up. he was mainly just there for her huge cock and her political influence

quartermaster

two crew members are fucking and everyone can hear it
this pisses off the navigator because they always do a specific position and he's a repressed bisexual who doesn't understand polyamory. the two are in an open relationship and often invite people to join in or watch. the navigator also knows the chef and doctor joined in once.

the first mate has a crush on the captain. they also have son issues but none of the rugged stoicness so she spoilers her precious emo boy a lot (alimony). the first mate used to be the navigators math tutor and so she's still friendly to him but he's more prickly cause of the alimony favouritism. and evil now. and also because she kicked him off the ship when she heard him call alimony feathers the one time before he got back on the ship and alimony didn't understand what happened.

the first mates son is around alimony and the other gays age and he's the official bard and he knew Silas and had a massive crush on him and mainly he writes songs yearning for Silas without naming him but everyone knows and he doesn't know about Aries.

His crew's ship is named the Cacaphony
